query:
-- How many matched services have supplierAccount populated?
SELECT COUNT(*) AS matched_with_account
FROM services
WHERE customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
  AND supplierAccount IS NOT NULL AND supplierAccount != '';

-- How many unmatched services have supplierAccount populated?
SELECT COUNT(*) AS unmatched_with_account
FROM services
WHERE (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '')
  AND supplierAccount IS NOT NULL AND supplierAccount != '';

-- Sample of matched services with supplier accounts
SELECT externalId, supplierName, supplierAccount, customerExternalId
FROM services
WHERE customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
  AND supplierAccount IS NOT NULL AND supplierAccount != ''
LIMIT 5;
